name: South Vietnam: Saigon & Mui Ne Beach Relaxation 7 days
duration: Places:Ho Chi Minh City - Cu Chi Tunnels - Mekong Delta - Ben Tre - Mui Ne
highlights: Delve into the fascinating history of the Vietnam War with a visit to the Cu Chi Tunnels.
Spend your days basking in the sun on the golden sands or take a leisurely stroll along the coastline of Mui Ne Beach.
Witness the daily activities of local fishermen with a visit to the Mekong Delta.
Experience the perfect balance of tranquility, adventure, and nature in Vietnam's tropical paradise.

itinerary.title: Ho Chi Minh City Arrival
itinerary.description:
Morning

When you arrive in bustling Ho Chi Minh City, the tour guide will greet you at the airport. Transport you to your hotel for check-in. NOTE: The hotel's check-in time is 14:00. Contact us if you want to obtain an early check-in, there will be an extra price. Enjoy your free time for the rest of the day.
itinerary.accommodation: Hotel in Ho Chi Minh city

itinerary.title: Ho Chi Minh City & Cu Chi Tunnels Exploration
itinerary.description:
Morning

Wake up early and savor a delicious breakfast at your accommodation. Around 08:00, start your day with a journey to the Cu Chi Tunnels, situated approximately 70km from Ho Chi Minh City. Delve into the tunnels, gaining insights into the Vietnam War and its historical significance. For an additional charge, you can even experience the firing-gun services, getting a hands-on feel of history. Enjoy your light lunch in a local restaurant at Cu Chi Tunnels
itinerary.accommodation: Hotel in Ho Chi Minh city

itinerary.title: Day Trip To Mekong Delta
itinerary.description:
Morning

After enjoying a satisfying breakfast and packing your belongings, get ready for an exciting day in Ben Tre Province. Depart around  08:00 and go on a boat that will cruise along the picturesque Ham Luong River, a tributary of the Mekong. During the journey, you'll make stops at various local workplaces to gain insight into the local economy. Visit a coconut processing workshop, where you can sample fresh coconut and witness the transformation of every part of this versatile nut into food. Next, explore a mat weaving house and even try your hand at weaving using a traditional handloom...
itinerary.accommodation: Hotel in Ho Chi Minh city

itinerary.title: Transfer to Mui Ne by bus
itinerary.description:
Morning

After savoring a delightful breakfast, take your time to relax and enjoy some leisure activities before your departure. Move on a comfortable shuttle bus journey to Mui Ne, which will take approximately 4 hours. Arrive at your hotel in Mui Ne, where you can settle in and prepare for an exciting afternoon. Afternoon

The remainder of the day is yours to explore and enjoy at your own pace. Whether you choose to lounge on the stunning beaches, indulge in water sports, or explore the local attractions, Mui Ne offers a wide range of activities to suit your preferences

itinerary.title: Mui Ne Exploration
itinerary.description: Today, set out to discover the highlights of Mui Ne. Begin with a visit to Bai Da Ong Dia (Mr. Dia Rock Beach), a unique coastal site with fascinating rock formations. Continue to the Wine Castle, where European-style architecture meets premium collections of wine. Then, explore the ancient Poshanu Cham Towers, a cultural and historical relic of the Champa Kingdom
itinerary.accommodation: Hotel or resort on Mui Ne

itinerary.title: Mui Ne – Ke Ga Cape & Dragon Fruit Garden
itinerary.description: This morning, head to Mui Ke Ga (Ke Ga Cape), a peaceful coastal area famous for its rugged rock formations and Vietnam’s oldest lighthouse, built in 1899. From here, you can enjoy panoramic sea views and take photos of the stunning landscape. Continue your journey with a visit to a local dragon fruit garden. As Binh Thuan Province is the largest producer of dragon fruit in Vietnam, this is a great opportunity to walk among the cactus-like plants, learn how they are cultivated, and taste the fresh, sweet fruit right from the garden. Return to your hotel in Mui Ne to relax.

itinerary.title: Ho Chi Minh Departure
itinerary.description: Take a bus to transfer back to Ho Chi Minh City for your flight back to your home town or next destination. NOTE: Book the flight out in the late evening, because it takes 4 hours to drive from Mui Ne to Tan Son Nhat Airport.

included: Overnight in shared Twin/ Double room with air-condition (AC) at hotel.
All transport in tour - transfer by new modern vehicle
Meals as listed in the program
All in-tour stationed local English speaking guide.
importantNotes: PROGRAMS & SCHEDULES SUBJECT TO CHANGE WITHOUT PRIOR NOTICE
